title: jasminum nobile subsp. rex
intro: Jasminum nobile subsp. rex, commonly known as the 'King of the Night', is a subspecies of the Jasminum nobile plant, a type of flowering vine native to the Himalayas and other parts of Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which are attributed to its high concentration of flavonoids and saponins. The health benefits of Jasminum nobile subsp. rex include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as asthma and bronchitis, as well as its potential to reduce blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing its flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits, although it is essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedies.
